generated_oml:
oml:namespace DTDFVocab "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory data for crane control actions"
]

instance TrajectoryDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory deviations for operator notification"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data for operator monitoring"
]

instance DataLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for validation purposes"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing simulated vs. actual trajectories",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryDeviationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization via Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB database",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLogInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics for validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for time-series data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for messaging",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor and actuator interfacing",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for system control",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CapellaArcadiaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella Arcadia for model-based systems engineering",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance DarTwinEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for tracking evolution",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder for measuring hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of crane structure from Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics validation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance CapellaArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella Arcadia model for model-based systems engineering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaArcadiaEnabler
]

instance DarTwinNotationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for tracking digital twin evolution",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DarTwinEnabler
]

instance SensorReadingsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series sensor readings and trajectory execution data stored in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor (stepper motor) controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor (stepper motor) controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance TimescaleDBContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database container"
]

instance GrafanaDashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard container"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator Service container"
]

instance SimulationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation Service container"
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service container"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker container"
]

instance PhysicalCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in the Port of Antwerp, used for moving small pucks representing containers between locations",
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system composed of six interconnected containers",
    base:contains TimescaleDBContainer, GrafanaDashboardContainer, TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer, SimulationServiceContainer, ContinuousValidationServiceContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into motor controller commands for movement and hoisting."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation services with no specified temporal resolution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated system where physical crane components (motors, sensors) interact with digital services via MQTT and database; digital services include Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, Dashboard, and Logging applications, all containerized and orchestrated through Docker compose."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the 'as operated' phase of the physical crane, with digital twin used during operational phase for continuous validation, trajectory optimization, and monitoring; CAD models represent the 'as designed' phase but the DT is primarily used for operational monitoring."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulated trajectories using distance metrics; thresholds determine validity; model validation techniques from [5] applied for verification of simulation accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for data exchange between physical crane interface and digital services; Python-based gantrylib module handles communication with hardware controllers."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer with Docker containerization for database (TimescaleDB), dashboard (Grafana), and MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto); gantrylib Python module runs on the host OS."
]
